task_completion.description: Navigate the map to the target coordinates in the Swiss Alps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl map should be centered on a mountainous/glacier region, or the search bar/coordinate display should show coordinates near 46.435 N, 8.020 E.
A green polygon with a grid of flight lines inside it should be visible on the map, and the right-hand panel should display 'Survey' settings.

task_completion.description: Enable terrain following for the survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Survey settings panel on the right, the 'Terrain' checkbox or 'Vehicle follows terrain' option must be checked/enabled.

task_completion.description: Set the flight altitude to 50 m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Survey settings panel, the 'Altitude' input field should be set to 50 (with a tolerance of +/- 5m).

task_completion.description: Set frontal and side overlaps to 80%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Survey settings panel, both the 'Frontal Overlap' and 'Side Overlap' input fields should be set to 80% (with a tolerance of +/- 5%).

task_completion.description: Save the mission plan to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager window should be visible, showing the file being saved as 'glacier_survey.plan' in the '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to create the mission.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the QGroundControl application interface, not a text editor or terminal writing the .plan JSON file directly.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the parameters into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings (altitude, overlaps, terrain following) should be visible within the QGroundControl parameter input fields.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file save dialog should be triggered from within QGroundControl (e.g., File -> Save or Sync -> Save to File), rather than using terminal commands to move or create the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target mission plan must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/glacier_survey.plan'. The target flight altitude is 50m (acceptable range: 45m - 55m). The target frontal and side overlaps are 80% (acceptable range: 75% - 85%). The mission must be a Survey pattern with terrain following explicitly enabled in the QGC interface.
